prompt: A photorealistic studio portrait in a vertical 4:5 composition showing two versions of the same male person seated side by side against a plain warm beige-gray studio backdrop. On the left, a child version of the same person sits cross-legged, wearing a light gray crew-neck T-shirt and medium-blue jeans, with neatly styled dark brown to black hair swept back and slightly voluminous. The child is turned slightly to the right, looking toward the adult version with a soft innocent smile and relaxed posture. Above the child, place the text 1997 in a simple elegant black serif font. On the right, the present-day version of the same person sits cross-legged, larger in scale and closer to camera, wearing a plain white crew-neck T-shirt and blue jeans, with matching facial structure and matching dark swept-back hair. He leans forward slightly with both hands clasped together under his chin, elbows resting near his knees, and looks left toward the child with a calm gentle smile. Above the adult, place the text 2026 in the same black serif font. Keep both subjects visually consistent as the same person at two ages, emphasizing emotional connection, recognition, and quiet reflection. Use soft cinematic warm studio lighting, realistic skin texture, subtle shadows, minimal styling, professional editorial photography, sharp focus, natural proportions, and a clean uncluttered composition. The image should feel like a real photoshoot, intimate, minimal, emotional, and highly realistic.
